title: Create: RailwaySignals
description:
This Create addon adds Speedlimiter and SpeedSign blocks to control and display train speed limits.
It also includes three ID items: Visitor, Supervisor, and Worker.
body:
## 🚂 Create: Speed Control Addon  

Enhance your railway systems in Create with new speed control mechanics and roleplay features!  

---

### 📦 Dependencies  
This addon requires the following mods to work:  

**[Create (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)**  
[![Create (Fabric)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xbc0uyRg/bb29eb217b1fd159579409b06ec7b976afd30b14_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)  

**[Flywheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/flywheel)**  
[![Flywheel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5lpsZoRi/1c3d6bf00107070bf0d74cb0283ccfc3c34fd821_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/flywheel)  


Make sure these are installed before running the addon!  

---

### 🛠 Features  

#### **Speedlimiter Block**  
- Set train speed limits in **20 steps**, from **0** (maximum allowed speed) up to **200 km/h**.  
- **Right-click** to increase the speed limit.  
- **Shift-right-click** to decrease the speed limit.  
- Perfect for controlling traffic flow and ensuring safer operations on busy rail lines.  

#### **SpeedSign Block**  
- Place a SpeedSign **above** a Speedlimiter to automatically display the set speed.  
- **Shift-right-click** a SpeedSign on a Speedlimiter to **link** them, then place the sign **anywhere** you like — great for visibility along the track.  

#### **Whistle Block**  
- Hold the Whistle Block and **right-click** on a track where you want trains to trigger a whistle.  
- After linking, place the block **anywhere** — when a train passes the linked track, it will sound the whistle.  
- Adds realism and audible cues for train movements.  

#### **ID Items**  
- **Visitor ID**  
- **Supervisor ID**  
- **Worker ID**  
- Perfect for role-based multiplayer servers, permissions, and access control.  

---

### 🎯 Why Use This Addon?  
This addon adds both functionality and immersion to your Create railways. Control train speeds with ease, clearly display limits for operators, signal trains with whistles, and introduce roleplay possibilities with ID cards. Whether you're building a realistic rail network or running a multiplayer server with strict operations, these tools make your world more dynamic and organized.
